since_last: 31% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.67%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.52% · BTC +2.88% · Gold +1.46% · Nasdaq100 -2.01%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.67%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.67%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -7.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -13.52%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +11.23%, ISRG +4.71%, AAPL +4.66%, PLTR +4.53%, ADBE +4.50%. Laggards: TER -13.52%, KLAC -12.71%, CEVA -10.88%, MRVL -10.54%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.36% at $156.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
